author: phase-4-coordinator
content: AsFerray trait docstrings updated in 5458299 (the #195 batch) to accurately say 'Copy the NumPy array's contents into a fresh ferray Array' instead of claiming a zero-copy borrow. Verified in this pass that all three impls (Ix1, Ix2, IxDyn) have matching docs and implementation. Cross-references the crate-level copy discussion added in #195.
